title: Kyun Kyun Kyun
instruments: tabla, santoor, soft flute, tanpura drone
poem_text:
Chanda kyun hota gol?
Paani kyun hai thanda dhool?
Billu kyun karta meow?
Ghar ka dar kyun karta wow?
Raat ko taare kyun jalte?
Subah kyun sab so jaate?
Ped pe phal kyun lagte?
Badal kyun udte udte?
Mummy ke haath kyun garam?
Papa ke moochh kyun hain kam?
Dadi ki kahani kyun hai lambi?
Mera sapna kyun hai chhoti gadi?
cover_context: A glowing crescent moon floating above a tiny Indian village at dusk, with fireflies dancing like scattered stars.
